title: Sunflare Crystal PvP Resourcepack
description: Sunflare styled Crystal PvP resource pack
body:
🌅 Sunflare PvP Pack | 16x | Custom Sounds | Low Fire | No Explosion Particles

Ignite your PvP experience with Sunflare PvP Pack, a vibrant 16x texture pack designed for competitive players who want both performance and bold visuals. Inspired by warm amber tones and blazing orange highlights, this pack delivers a clean and energetic combat atmosphere while keeping gameplay smooth and responsive.

✨ Features

🟡 Amber-Themed Visuals
Bright yellow and orange accents refresh classic PvP textures with a warm, glowing style that stands out in every fight.

⚔️ PvP Optimized
Clear, simplified textures designed for better visibility and faster reaction time during intense combat.

🚀 FPS Friendly
Lightweight 16x resolution ensures smooth gameplay even on low- to mid-range PCs.

🔊 Custom Sounds
Unique sound effects for hits, blocks, and crystals to make every fight feel more impactful.

🔥 Integrated Low Fire
Minimal fire overlay that keeps your screen clear and improves visibility in battles.

🌤 Beautiful Sky Texture
Use OptiFine or FabricSkyBoxes to enable the custom sky.

Need more packs? Join my Discord.
